title: Update podmanimage like buildahimage
body:
@rhatdan recently updated how the buildahimage on quay.io is built and similar changes are needed for the podmanimage.  Creating this issue so I don't forget about chasing it down after the break if @rhatdan doesn't beat me to it.

Buildah PR of interest:  https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/2038

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Closed by #4819, I'm not sure why GIT didn't autoclose this.
